mapper.insert: INSERT INTO catalog_rel (node_id, biz_id, biz_type) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{bizId}, #{bizType})

INSERT INTO catalog_rel (node_id, biz_id, biz_type) VALUES
(#{item.nodeId}, #{item.bizId}, #{item.bizType})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM catalog_rel WHERE node_id = #{nodeId} AND biz_id = #{bizId} AND biz_type = #{bizType}

DELETE FROM catalog_rel WHERE node_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM catalog_rel WHERE node_id IN
#{id}
